# Fork Candidate

Owner: `pre-market-autoreasoner` or `launch-lead`

```yaml
fork_candidate:
  id: fc-YYYYMMDD-slug
  source_product_bet_id:
  source_revision_id:
  change_axis: buyer | positioning | pricing | channel | product_shape | activation | payment_path
  why_this_might_win:
  new_risks:
  required_tests:
  required_research_delta:
  expected_cost:
  decision: ignore | revise_current | open_fork
  decision_reason:
  created_by:
  created_at:
```

Fork candidates are not automatically new ventures. They are alternate
directions that Launch Lead can keep, ignore, or escalate.
